---
title: "Results"
---

## Key findings (draft)
Add bullet points as you go.

## Figures
Add figures as you generate them. Example:

## Initial GSEA Plot
![](figures/fig01_GSEA1.png){fig-cap="GSEA results showing metabolic pathway enrichment."}

## dotplot
![](figures/fig02_dotplot.png){fig-cap="dotplot results comparing cell types with average gene expression of common markers."}

## UMAP
![](figures/fig03_UMAP_CellTypes.png){fig-cap="UMAP comparing cell clusters"}


## Rolodex of Cell type GSEA (individual)

## Interactive GSEA by Cell Type

To avoid stacking all cell-type-specific pathway enrichment plots vertically, this section provides an interactive viewer for comparing GSEA results across annotated liver cell populations. Use the dropdown menu or the previous/next buttons to browse enrichment patterns for each cell type.

<div style="max-width: 1200px;">
  <label for="gseaSelect"><strong>Select GSEA plot:</strong></label>
  <select id="gseaSelect" onchange="updateGSEA()" style="margin-left: 8px; padding: 4px;">
    <option value="figures/GSEA_global_v1.png" selected>Global ALD vs Control</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_Test_B_Cells.png">B Cells</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_Test_CDCs.png">cDCs</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_Test_cholangiocytes.png">Cholangiocytes</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_Test_Endothelial_Cells.png">Endothelial Cells</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_Test_Hepatocytes.png">Hepatocytes</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_hepatocytes.png">Hepatocytes Variant 1</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_hepatocytes_v1.png">Hepatocytes Variant 2</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_hepatocytes_v2.png">Hepatocytes Variant 3</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_hepatocytes_v2.1.png">Hepatocytes Variant 4</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_Test_Kupffer_Cells.png">Kupffer Cells</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_Test_Monocytes.png">Monocytes</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_Test_NK_Cells.png">NK Cells</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_Test_Stellate_Cells.png">Stellate Cells</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_Test_T_Cells.png">T Cells</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_T_Cells.png">T Cells Variant 1</option>
    <option value="figures/GSEA_T_Cells_v1.png">T Cells Variant 2</option>
  </select>

  <button onclick="prevGSEA()" style="margin-left: 10px;">Previous</button>
  <button onclick="nextGSEA()">Next</button>

  <p id="gseaCaption" style="margin-top: 12px;">
    Global gene set enrichment analysis comparing ALD and control samples across the integrated dataset.
  </p>

  <img
    id="gseaImage"
    src="figures/GSEA_global_v1.png"
    alt="Interactive GSEA plot viewer"
    style="width: 100%; max-width: 1200px; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 6px;"
  >
</div>

<script>
const gseaCaptions = {
  "figures/GSEA_global_v1.png": "Global gene set enrichment analysis comparing ALD and control samples across the integrated dataset.",
  "figures/GSEA_Test_B_Cells.png": "Gene set enrichment analysis for B cells comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_Test_CDCs.png": "Gene set enrichment analysis for conventional dendritic cells comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_Test_cholangiocytes.png": "Gene set enrichment analysis for cholangiocytes comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_Test_Endothelial_Cells.png": "Gene set enrichment analysis for endothelial cells comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_Test_Hepatocytes.png": "Gene set enrichment analysis for hepatocytes comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_hepatocytes.png": "Alternative hepatocyte GSEA result comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_hepatocytes_v1.png": "Alternative hepatocyte GSEA result (version 1) comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_hepatocytes_v2.png": "Alternative hepatocyte GSEA result (version 2) comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_hepatocytes_v2.1.png": "Alternative hepatocyte GSEA result (version 2.1) comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_Test_Kupffer_Cells.png": "Gene set enrichment analysis for Kupffer cells comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_Test_Monocytes.png": "Gene set enrichment analysis for monocytes comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_Test_NK_Cells.png": "Gene set enrichment analysis for NK cells comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_Test_Stellate_Cells.png": "Gene set enrichment analysis for stellate cells comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_Test_T_Cells.png": "Gene set enrichment analysis for T cells comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_T_Cells.png": "Alternative T-cell GSEA result comparing ALD and control samples.",
  "figures/GSEA_T_Cells_v1.png": "Alternative T-cell GSEA result (version 1) comparing ALD and control samples."
};

function updateGSEA() {
  const select = document.getElementById("gseaSelect");
  const img = document.getElementById("gseaImage");
  const caption = document.getElementById("gseaCaption");
  const selectedValue = select.value;

  img.src = selectedValue;
  caption.textContent = gseaCaptions[selectedValue] || "Gene set enrichment analysis comparing ALD and control samples.";
}

function nextGSEA() {
  const select = document.getElementById("gseaSelect");
  select.selectedIndex = (select.selectedIndex + 1) % select.options.length;
  updateGSEA();
}

function prevGSEA() {
  const select = document.getElementById("gseaSelect");
  select.selectedIndex = (select.selectedIndex - 1 + select.options.length) % select.options.length;
  updateGSEA();
}
</script>
